user_initial_prompt: build a backend for online bakery shop
tech_stack_summary: Web Development → Backend → REST → JavaScript/TypeScript → NestJS → NGINX

Core Application & Web Stacks -> Web Dev.rationale: This choice is suitable for building the backend for an online bakery shop as it provides the necessary tools to create dynamic web pages and handle server-side logic.
Core Application & Web Stacks -> Web Dev.purpose: Enables creation of a backend infrastructure to manage the online bakery shop's functionality, such as product management, inventory tracking, order processing, and customer interactions.

Web Development -> Backend.rationale: The Backend is required to manage and process data related to the online bakery shop such as orders, inventory, user authentication etc.
Web Development -> Backend.purpose: This option enables managing and processing of data for the backend functionality

Backend -> REST.rationale: REST (Representational State Transfer) is a well-established and widely-used API design pattern, making it easier for developers to understand and implement the backend for an online bakery shop.
Backend -> REST.purpose: Enables easy communication between the frontend and backend using standard HTTP methods such as GET, POST, PUT, DELETE.

REST -> JavaScript/TypeScript.rationale: For simplicity, quick development and easy integration with frontend (if using React or Angular), JavaScript/TypeScript is chosen.
REST -> JavaScript/TypeScript.purpose: Enables efficient server-side logic implementation for the online bakery shop.

JavaScript/TypeScript -> NestJS.rationale: NestJS is built on top of Express and provides additional features like modularity, DI (Dependency Injection), and TypeScript support making it suitable for large-scale projects.
JavaScript/TypeScript -> NestJS.purpose: Enables the development of a scalable backend for an online bakery shop.

NestJS -> NGINX.rationale: Popular choice for handling high traffic applications and reverse proxying in Node.js projects
NestJS -> NGINX.purpose: Enables efficient routing and management of requests to the NestJS application
